description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the zachgeek/songbook-builder:latest Docker image and defines two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add an everything job that runs "ruby --version", then "export LANG=en_US.UTF-8", "export LANGUAGE=en_US.UTF-8", "export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8", then "pushd SvgConverter && npm i && popd", followed by "rake", and archives the generated typst/*.pdf files and the html directory as artifacts. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs "mv html public", "cp public/songbook.html public/index.html", "cp typst/*.pdf public", and publishes the public directory as the pages artifact. Configure the pages job to run only on the main branch.
